subcodes.first_line: O ye exiles in the path of the Friend! When that Beloved of all horizons shone forth in the gathering of the faithful ones, He began to unveil a mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آوارگان کوی دوست آندلبر آفاق چون در انجمن اهل وفاق اشراق نمود آغاز رازی کرد
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom
